net.datafaker

Class Time

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.datafaker.Time

  • public class Time
extends java.lang.Object
    Since:
    1.4.0

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      protected Time(Faker faker) 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      long between(java.time.LocalTime from, java.time.LocalTime to)
      Generates a random time between two times.
      java.lang.String between(java.time.LocalTime from, java.time.LocalTime to, java.lang.String pattern)
      Generates a string representation of a random time between two times.
      long future(int atMost, java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit)
      Generates a future time from now.
      java.lang.String future(int atMost, java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit, java.lang.String pattern)
      Generates and converts to string representation a future time from now.
      long future(int atMost, int minimum, java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit)
      Generates a future time from now, with a minimum time.
      java.lang.String future(int atMost, int minimum, java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit, java.lang.String pattern)
      Generates and converts to string representation of a future time from now, with a minimum time.
      long past(int atLeast, java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit)
      Generates a past time from now.
      java.lang.String past(int atMost, java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit, java.lang.String pattern)
      Generates a string representation of a past time from now.
      long past(int atMost, int minimum, java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit)
      Generates a past time from now, with a minimum time.
      java.lang.String past(int atMost, int minimum, java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit, java.lang.String pattern)
      Generates and converts to string representation a past time from now, with a minimum time.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Time

        protected Time(Faker faker)

    • Method Detail

      • future

        public long future(int atMost,
                   java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit)
        Generates a future time from now. Note that there is a 1 second slack to avoid generating a past time.
        Parameters:
        atMost - at most this amount of time ahead from now exclusive.
        unit - the time unit.
        Returns:
        a future time from now.

      • future

        public java.lang.String future(int atMost,
                               java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit,
                               java.lang.String pattern)
        Generates and converts to string representation a future time from now. Note that there is a 1 second slack to avoid generating a past time.
        Parameters:
        atMost - at most this amount of time ahead from now exclusive.
        unit - the time unit.
        pattern - time pattern to convert to string.
        Returns:
        a string representation of a future time from now.

      • future

        public long future(int atMost,
                   int minimum,
                   java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit)
        Generates a future time from now, with a minimum time.
        Parameters:
        atMost - at most this amount of time ahead from now exclusive.
        minimum - the minimum amount of time in the future from now.
        unit - the time unit.
        Returns:
        a future time from now, with a minimum time.

      • future

        public java.lang.String future(int atMost,
                               int minimum,
                               java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit,
                               java.lang.String pattern)
        Generates and converts to string representation of a future time from now, with a minimum time.
        Parameters:
        atMost - at most this amount of time ahead from now exclusive.
        minimum - the minimum amount of time in the future from now.
        unit - the time unit.
        pattern - time pattern to convert to string.
        Returns:
        a string representation of a future time from now, with a minimum time.

      • past

        public long past(int atLeast,
                 java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit)
        Generates a past time from now. Note that there is a 1 second slack added.
        Parameters:
        atLeast - at most this amount of time earlier from now exclusive.
        unit - the time unit.
        Returns:
        a past time from now.

      • past

        public java.lang.String past(int atMost,
                             java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit,
                             java.lang.String pattern)
        Generates a string representation of a past time from now. Note that there is a 1 second slack added.
        Parameters:
        atMost - at most this amount of time earlier from now exclusive.
        unit - the time unit.
        pattern - time pattern to convert to string.
        Returns:
        a string representation of a past time from now.

      • past

        public long past(int atMost,
                 int minimum,
                 java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit)
        Generates a past time from now, with a minimum time.
        Parameters:
        atMost - at most this amount of time earlier from now exclusive.
        minimum - the minimum amount of time in the past from now.
        unit - the time unit.
        Returns:
        a past time from now.

      • past

        public java.lang.String past(int atMost,
                             int minimum,
                             java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit unit,
                             java.lang.String pattern)
        Generates and converts to string representation a past time from now, with a minimum time.
        Parameters:
        atMost - at most this amount of time earlier from now exclusive.
        minimum - the minimum amount of time in the past from now.
        unit - the time unit.
        pattern - time pattern to convert to string.
        Returns:
        a string representation of a past time from now, with a minimum time.

      • between

        public long between(java.time.LocalTime from,
                    java.time.LocalTime to)
             throws java.lang.IllegalArgumentException
        Generates a random time between two times.
        Parameters:
        from - the lower bound inclusive
        to - the upper bound exclusive
        Returns:
        a random time between from and to.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the to time represents an earlier time than from time.

      • between

        public java.lang.String between(java.time.LocalTime from,
                                java.time.LocalTime to,
                                java.lang.String pattern)
                         throws java.lang.IllegalArgumentException
        Generates a string representation of a random time between two times.
        Parameters:
        from - the lower bound inclusive
        to - the upper bound exclusive
        pattern - time pattern to convert to string.
        Returns:
        a string representation of a random time between from and to.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the to time represents an earlier time than from time.
